Off Calendar Sep-06-2019 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-18-661918 WITH CASE CGC-19-575423
Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nancy Holden in Properia Persona, 415-933-4079, Defendant and opposing party.

No other appearances.

Hearing is held. The Court read aloud the tentative ruling to Nancy.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MELVIN HOLDEN, NANCY HOLDEN MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-18-661918 WITH CASE CGC-19-575423 is DENIED without prejudice. Moving parties failed to comply with the Court's May 30, 2019 Order requiring Plaintiff to provide the Court with courtesy copies of the moving papers to Dept. 501 no later than June 3, 2019.
Additionally, Moving Parties failed to comply with the requirements of a motion to consolidate in CRC 3.350. Moving parties should also note that there is currently a default entered against them in CUD-18-575423. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Moving parties shall comply with SFLR 2.7B and delivery courtesy copies to Department 501 no later than June 3, 2019. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
